license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.yz7fx9n
title: Yale - Alkaline Phosphatase
author: Gary Cline

steps_raw.instruction: Calibrate Cobas for Alkaline Phosphatase Activity analysis by running two assayed control serum.

Sample handling as performed by the Cobas Mira Plus. a) Pipette 3 µL of sample into a cuvette slot. b) Add 150 µL of Alkaline Phosphatase Reagent. c) Mixture is incubated at 37˚C and spun for 10 minutes. d) Absorbance is measured at 405 nm.
